---
title: "Weather Project"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-05-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(httr2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

Importing windy data. 
```{r}
url = "https://api.windy.com/api/point-forecast/v2"

#parameter list

request_body = list(
  "lat": 49.809,
  "lon": 16.787,
  "model": "desired_model",
  "parameters": ["desired_parameter_1", "desired_parameter_2", ...],
  "levels": ["optionally_desired_gh_level_1", ...],
  "key": "your_API_key"
)
# Send the POST request
response = request(url) |> 
  req_body_json(request_body) |> 
  req_perform()
  
# Extract the raw content from the response
raw_data = response |> resp_body_json()

```
